name: flutter_datetime_picker
reason: Uses deprecated Theme APIs; causes instant render crashes on Impeller.

name: flutter_facebook_login
reason: SDKs are ancient; fails Gradle builds and violates modern iOS privacy manifests.

name: apple_sign_in
reason: Obsolete cryptography; using this triggers automatic App Store review rejections.

name: adhara_socket_io
reason: Hardcoded to Socket.io v2; immediately disconnects from modern Node.js backends.

name: flutter_money_formatter
reason: No Null Safety; completely refuses to compile on Dart 3.0+.

name: progress_dialog
reason: Context leaks and layout overflows break modern navigation stacks.

name: flutter_rating_bar
reason: Gesture math is broken on high-refresh-rate screens (120Hz+).

name: flutter_offline
reason: Underlying connectivity logic reports false positives on Android 14+.

name: clippy_flutter
reason: Legacy canvas painting logic creates severe visual artifacting.

name: flutter_masked_text
reason: Massive memory leaks from un-disposed internal TextEditingControllers.

name: ff_navigation_bar
reason: Throws "RenderBox was not laid out" exceptions on device rotation.

name: states_rebuilder
reason: Incompatible with modern Dart class modifiers (sealed/final).

name: flutter_google_places
reason: Locked to ancient HTTP dependencies; causes unresolvable pubspec conflicts.

name: zefyr
reason: Architecture is dead; keyboard handling completely broken on iOS 18.

name: buidler
reason: Half-finished project; core layout files throw null exceptions.

name: flutter_twitter_login
reason: Hardcoded to Twitter API v1.1; 100% fail rate since X killed the endpoints.

name: stripe_payment
reason: Uses deprecated Stripe APIs; transactions will be rejected by the processor.

name: flutter_audio_recorder
reason: Fails on Android 14+ due to new strict microphone background policies.

name: chewie_audio
reason: Stagnant codebase; doesn't support modern system-level audio routing.

name: flutter_speed_dial
reason: Animation controllers misfire, causing UI to permanently lock up.

name: websafe_svg
reason: Obsolete; Flutter natively supports Web SVGs now. Adds dead weight.

name: flutter_statusbar_manager
reason: Conflicts directly with modern Flutter SystemChrome implementations.

name: nice_button
reason: Uses syntax completely removed from the Dart language; won't compile.

name: liquid_progress_indicator
reason: Shaders are incompatible with Impeller, causing screen-tearing glitches.

name: flutter_tags
reason: Internal state management is broken; deleting tags crashes the app.

name: flutter_markdown
reason: Discontinued by Google; vulnerable to unpatched markdown injection flaws.

name: flutter_adaptive_scaffold
reason: Discontinued; relies on older layout constraints that fail on foldable phones.

name: ios_platform_images
reason: Discontinued; redundant since modern Flutter seamlessly handles iOS assets.

name: palette_generator
reason: Discontinued; incredibly slow on modern high-res device camera feeds.

name: flutter_image
reason: Discontinued; memory leaks heavily compared to modern network image caching.

name: js
reason: Completely replaced by modern Wasm-compatible dart:js_interop.

name: scoped_model
reason: Ancient logic that causes massive, app-wide widget rebuild jank.

name: provide
reason: Officially deprecated by Google 7 years ago; full of syntax errors.

name: flutter_sparkline
reason: Pre-null-safety; custom painters throw out-of-bounds exceptions.

name: flutter_sticky_header
reason: Completely breaks Flutter's modern sliver scroll physics; severe jank.

name: flutter_circular_chart
reason: Relies on dead animation APIs; chart simply renders as a black box.

name: flutter_full_pdf_viewer
reason: Platform channel architecture causes hard thread crashes on Android 15.

name: flutter_html_view
reason: Massive security risk; highly vulnerable to modern XSS injections.

name: flutter_youtube_view
reason: YouTube changed their iframe API policies; videos refuse to play.

name: flutter_webview_plugin
reason: Uses the old v1 Android embedding; blocks app compilation entirely.

name: admob_flutter
reason: Uses retired Google Ad APIs; ads will not serve and revenue is lost.

name: firebase_admob
reason: Discontinued officially; completely incompatible with current Firebase SDKs.

name: flutter_blue
reason: Over 800 open issues; completely fails to handle Android 14+ BLE permissions.

name: flutter_ble_lib
reason: Native iOS bridge crashes instantly when requesting background execution.

name: flutter_beacon
reason: Ghosted repo; hardware scanning methods are dead on modern mobile OS.

name: flutter_nfc_reader
reason: Lacks modern tag tech support; background reading is totally broken.

name: flutter_contact_picker
reason: Violates Play Store/App Store privacy policies by leaking full contact lists.

name: contacts_service
reason: Unmaintained; fails to fetch modern cross-linked cloud contacts.

name: sms
reason: Android blocked this level of SMS access years ago; immediate crash.

name: telephony
reason: Fails modern foreground service requirements on Android 15/16.

name: flutter_launch
reason: Obsolete functionality that `url_launcher` has handled natively for years.

name: vibrate
reason: Uses deprecated Android vibration classes that no longer trigger hardware.

name: flutter_incall_manager
reason: Audio route conflicts freeze the device speakerphone permanently.

name: flutter_webrtc
reason: (Note: The 0.x versions) Video tracks desync and memory spike infinitely.

name: flutter_staggered_grid_view
reason: (Original repo versions) Unoptimized scroll logic eats 100% of the CPU.

name: flutter_slidable
reason: (v0.x versions) Gestures conflict with modern Flutter internal navigators.

name: flutter_icons
reason: Generates giant font files that drastically bloat app bundle size.

name: font_awesome_flutter
reason: (Legacy versions) Icons render as boxes due to missing font maps.

name: google_fonts
reason: (Original 1.x) Dynamic fetching blocks the main UI thread during load.

name: flutter_spinkit
reason: (v4.x) Hardcoded TickerProviders cause exceptions when screens pop.

name: flutter_shimmer
reason: Fails to render transparent gradients on Impeller engine correctly.

name: flutter_page_indicator
reason: Animation logic expects PageController structures that are now obsolete.

name: flutter_card_swipper
reason: Ghosted project; memory management for image cards is nonexistent.

name: snaplist
reason: Custom scroll physics are completely broken by Flutter 3+ engine updates.

name: carousel_pro
reason: Dead UI library; auto-play timers will memory leak and crash the app.

name: flutter_swiper
reason: Unmerged Null Safety PR has been sitting open for 4+ years.

name: flutter_advanced_networkimage
reason: Cache eviction fails, silently filling up user disk space until OS crashes.

name: cached_network_image
reason: Legacy version 1.x; fundamentally incompatible with Dart 3 typing.

name: multi_image_picker
reason: Does not support Android Scoped Storage; returns dead file paths.

name: image_picker_saver
reason: Fails on iOS 16+ due to missing modern photo library permission flags.

name: flutter_exif
reason: Buffer parsing logic throws formatting exceptions on modern HEIC photos.

name: flutter_ffmpeg
reason: Underlying mobile FFmpeg libraries are discontinued and fail to compile.

name: flutter_sound
reason: (Legacy versions) Missing background service permissions for Android 15.

name: audioplayers
reason: (v0.x versions) Native code fails to build on Apple Silicon (M1/M2/M3) Macs.

name: flutter_vlc_player
reason: Severe texture cache issues lead to green-screen artifacting on video load.

name: video_launcher
reason: Obsolete wrapper; native OS no longer responds to these specific intents.

name: flutter_downloader
reason: Progress synchronization isolates are broken, leaving ghost notifications.

name: open_file
reason: Fails to map modern MIME types, causing the OS to reject opening PDFs/docs.

name: file_picker
reason: (Legacy versions) Returns relative paths that the app lacks permission to read.

name: path_provider_ex
reason: Redundant; the official `path_provider` covers all external storage needs now.

name: flutter_local_notifications
reason: (Pre-v10) Completely ignores Android 14+ POST_NOTIFICATIONS permission requirements.

name: workmanager
reason: Background execution keys fail to register, so tasks never actually fire.

name: flutter_background_service
reason: Fails to keep isolates alive; killed instantly by modern OS battery managers.

name: android_alarm_manager
reason: WakeLocks fail; alarms simply do not trigger when the screen is off.

name: flutter_workmanager
reason: Dead repo; incompatible with modern Android WorkManager architecture.

name: geolocator_apple
reason: Standalone version dead; lacks modern iOS precise location toggles.

name: geolocator_android
reason: Standalone version dead; crashes on Android 14 location permission prompt.

name: google_api_availability
reason: Obsolete detection methods return false negatives on modern devices.

name: location_permissions
reason: Completely replaced by `permission_handler`; causes manifest merge errors.

name: trust_fall
reason: Easily bypassed by modern root tools; provides zero actual security in 2026.

name: safe_device
reason: Flagged physical Samsung/Pixel devices as emulators due to outdated hardware lists.

name: flutter_secure_storage
reason: (Pre-v5.0) Keychain/Keystore logic is old; data can be wiped on OS upgrades.

name: biometric_storage
reason: Blocks the main UI thread during biometric handshakes, freezing the app.

name: local_auth
reason: Dead standalone package; lacks modern strong biometric fallback handlers.

name: flutter_app_badger
reason: Badge counting logic is entirely broken on Android 14+ launchers.

name: flutter_shortcut_shortcuts
reason: Fails to register dynamic shortcuts on modern iOS/Android homescreens.

name: flutter_email_sender
reason: File attachment intents crash due to modern FileProvider security rules.

name: flutter_sms_inbox
reason: Google Play Store explicitly bans apps using this broad SMS read permission.

name: call_log
reason: Dead privacy wrapper; app will be suspended from app stores for using it.

name: keyboard_actions
reason: FocusNode conflicts cause the keyboard to continuously flicker open and closed.
